summary: Focused regression + new feature test for 3 changes: (1) Roles tab removed from sidebar, (2) Users tab now has Users + Quick Presets sub-tabs, (3) Base Currency defaults to USD in New Partner Org dialog. All 8 test scenarios verified via Playwright.

design_issues.screen: New Partner Org dialog - Base Currency select
issues: data-testid is 'new-partner-currency' (line 567 of TenantsTab.tsx) but review request spec says it should be 'new-partner-base-currency'. Functionality is correct (defaults to USD), just testid naming mismatch. Minor.
Preset card for Support Agent has data-testid='preset-card-support' (key='support'), not 'preset-card-support_agent'. Minor naming note for future test reference.

action_items: Optional: Rename data-testid on base currency SelectTrigger in TenantsTab.tsx from 'new-partner-currency' to 'new-partner-base-currency' to match spec (line 567)
critical_code_review_comments: Admin.tsx correctly has no RolesTab import and no roles tab trigger - Roles tab cleanly removed.
UsersTab.tsx PresetsSubTab correctly renders preset cards from /admin/permissions/modules endpoint.
TenantsTab.tsx line 83: base_currency default is 'USD' as required.
Minor testid mismatch: new-partner-base-currency (spec) vs new-partner-currency (actual in code line 567).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_165: All 3 fixes verified: (1) No Roles tab in sidebar - PASS, (2) Users tab has Users + Quick Presets sub-tabs with correct data-testids - PASS, (3) New Partner Org base_currency defaults to USD - PASS (functional), (4) Liger Inc org info shows USD - PASS. Minor: data-testid on currency select is 'new-partner-currency' not 'new-partner-base-currency'. Support Agent preset key is 'support' not 'support_agent'.

test_features_verified.roles_tab_removed: PASS: No admin-tab-roles in sidebar, confirmed via DOM query
test_features_verified.users_subtab_list: PASS: data-testid=users-subtab-list present in Users tab
test_features_verified.users_subtab_presets: PASS: data-testid=users-subtab-presets present in Users tab
test_features_verified.presets_subtab_container: PASS: data-testid=presets-subtab present when Quick Presets clicked
test_features_verified.preset_cards_all_5: PASS: preset-card-manager, preset-card-support, preset-card-viewer, preset-card-accountant, preset-card-content_editor all present
test_features_verified.add_user_quick_preset: PASS: data-testid=new-user-preset in Create User dialog
test_features_verified.new_partner_base_currency_usd: PASS: Base Currency defaults to 'USD' (shown in dialog), testid is 'new-partner-currency'
test_features_verified.liger_inc_org_base_currency: PASS: data-testid=base-currency-select shows 'USD' in Liger Inc Organization Info
